title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications Consulting Pvt Ltd!
